meaning: vi.[物]显示超导(电)性,起超导(电) 体作用,无电阻导电
examples: Such materials could have limitless applications if they could be made to superconduct at room temperature.
Hla says it should be possible to grow the wires on semiconductors or insulators as well and prove that electrons superconduct along the wires.
Hudson's team is focusing on the state of matter that exists at temperatures just above the temperature at which materials start to superconduct.
